aeo_readiness.summary: The website has a decent foundation for AEO with proper schema markup and localized content, but lacks reviews and detailed content depth.
quick_wins: Generate and display customer reviews to build trust and improve local search presence.
Expand service pages with more detailed content and target long-tail keywords.
Implement a blog to regularly publish relevant content about HVAC services and local trends.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes location-specific information and service areas.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has localized its content to some extent, but it lacks depth in location-specific pages and detailed service area information.
critical_issues: No dedicated location pages for each city mentioned (e.g., Brighton, Broomfield).
Missing localized content such as customer testimonials or case studies specific to each location.

nap_citations.summary: The business has not yet established a strong presence across major citation platforms.
action_items: Create and verify Google Business Profile listing to improve local search visibility.
Ensure consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) across all online directories and platforms.
List the business on relevant local and industry-specific directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and HVAC-focused sites.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema specifying the business type, founding date, and other relevant details.
Missing Service schema for each specific service offered (e.g., Furnace Repair, A/C Installation).
No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address, geo-coordinates, and opening hours.
No Review schema to showcase customer testimonials and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed localized content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed HVAC services or specific location-based queries.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and creating dedicated location pages.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Publishing expert articles and guides on HVAC topics to establish the business as a local authority.

page_title: Heating Repair, AC Repair, Electrician & Heating Service | Brighton, CO, Broomfield, CO, Federal Heights, CO, Northglenn, CO, Thornton, CO & Westminster, CO | All Climate Systems Heating and Cooling
